categories:

---

two Es, too Ez! 用SPCCTF{}包裹



试着了解一下扩展欧几里得算法





```plain
import gmpy2

# 已知参数
n = 
e1 = 1550550838
e2 = 4196113069
c1 = 
c2 = 

# 计算扩展欧几里得系数
s, s1, s2 = gmpy2.gcdext(e1, e2)

# 处理负指数（如果有的话）
if s1 < 0:
    s1 = -s1
    c1 = gmpy2.invert(c1, n)  # 求模逆
if s2 < 0:
    s2 = -s2
    c2 = gmpy2.invert(c2, n)  # 求模逆

# 计算明文
m = (pow(c1, s1, n) * pow(c2, s2, n)) % n

# 转换为字节并输出
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
print(long_to_bytes(m).decode())
```

```plain
import gmpy2

# 已知参数
n = 
e1 = 1550550838
e2 = 4196113069
c1 = 
c2 = 

# 计算扩展欧几里得系数
s, s1, s2 = gmpy2.gcdext(e1, e2)

# 处理负指数（如果有的话）
if s1 < 0:
    s1 = -s1
    c1 = gmpy2.invert(c1, n)  # 求模逆
if s2 < 0:
    s2 = -s2
    c2 = gmpy2.invert(c2, n)  # 求模逆

# 计算明文
m = (pow(c1, s1, n) * pow(c2, s2, n)) % n

# 转换为字节并输出
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
print(long_to_bytes(m).decode())
```
